strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with core stack alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Direct AI agent development experience — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep testing culture: TDD practice, authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), created testing courses and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere on the résumé
Kotlin absent and Java experience is dated/peripheral (robotics tooling at Altom, 2016-2018); Python not listed in skills
No explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright mention — testing expertise is demonstrated largely in the D language ecosystem
response.justification: The role requires senior full-stack capability in TypeScript/Node.js/React, testing expertise, cloud/container knowledge, and AI agent development. The candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with over a decade of relevant work: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK at Optilyz, TDD and CI/CD at RIDE, and Kubernetes deployment for GISCollective. The required AI agent development skill is directly evidenced by MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq. Cloud (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), Git, and a CS bachelor's are all present. Gaps are narrow: Nest.js is never mentioned, Kotlin is absent with only older Java work, and the named testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest/Playwright) don't appear explicitly, though framework-authoring experience suggests fast ramp-up. Evidence strongly supports fit on high-weight competencies with minor framework-specific gaps.
